titleStmt.title: SII 23.106: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 106. (A.R. No. 106 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Kīri-Kṛishṇaṉ temple—on the same wall

summary.p: This is also dated in the same year and day of the king's reign as the above and registers an undertaking given by the assembly that they would not in future collect the taxes on the tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam lands since they had been declared tax-free by royal fiat.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastī śrī . tribhuvaṉacakkaravatti koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ
[rāja]rājacaturvvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyāṟkku kallaṭikkuṟucci
nālāiraviṇṇakar Emperumāṉukku karumāṇikkāḻvāṉāṉa veṇāvu ṭaiyāṉ poṉ
l tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭamākak koṇṭu Iṭṭa paṟṟukkaḷaiyum maṟṟuḷḷa
tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭaṅkaḷaiyum nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭu kaṭamai koṇṭu
potukiṟārkaḷākak keṭṭom Itumuṉpu mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiiliyumāy
tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭamumāy ponta Ittai Ippotu tāṅkaḷ kaṭamai ko ḷḷak
kaṭavatalla Eṉṉumpaṭiyai Aṟintu Ivvolai kaṇṭapoḻute Itu muṉpu
pole Iṟaiiliyāmpaṭi tāṅkaḷ kaṭamai koḷḷāmal Ivar koilu
kkuk kaṭavārkaḷvacam kaṭavatākaviṭṭu melum Ippaṭikkotta maṉa payāto
ḻikaveṉṟu koṭumaḷūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttiṉālum Aṇṭakkuṭiyuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttiṉā
lum yāṇṭu 9vatu nāḷ nūṟṟunāṟpatteḻiṉāl prasādam ceytaruḷittu
śubhamastu
Digital edition of SII 23.106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
